# @univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui)

`@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui` provides sparkline UI integration for Univer Sheets.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui` | `UniverProSheetsSparklineUi` | Yes | Yes | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import '@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui/lib/index.css';
import EnUS from '@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui/locale/en-US';
import { UniverSheetSparklineUIPlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline-ui';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverSheetSparklineUIPlugin);

// Merge EnUS into your Univer locale map when this package contributes UI text.
```

## Integration Notes

Use this package with `@univerjs-pro/sheets-sparkline` when users need sparkline editing UI.
